name: common_manipulation_0013
prompt: The humanoid robot picks up the bottle from the table and places it into the mesh basket next to it
json_upsampled_prompt:
{
  "scene_imagination": "Focus: humanoid robot with dark helmet-like head, glowing cyan visor strip, gray metallic torso, articulated arms with black gripper hands stands center-right facing left toward a small white table.   "scene_imagination": "Focus: a silver-and-black humanoid robot standing behind a large mobile whiteboard in a modern open-plan office lobby.
